sections.paragraph:
ἀνεγκλησία, ας, ἡ (ἀ-+ ἐγκαλέω; s. ἀνέγκλητος; pap oft.=indemnity) blamelessness (Bardesanes in Eus., PE 6, 10, 10 p. 274d) ἀ. τοῦ θεοῦ bl. before God Phil 3:14 v.l.—DELG s.v. καλέω (κλη-).

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

oft. oft. = often

Eus. Eus. = Eusebius of Caesarea, various works; IV a.d.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 76
